note: Advisory sandbox build. The deliverable is a Tier-1 diagnosis template; its proof is the repo language_gate dogfood (CHECK_OK when the report does not FAIL, CHECK_REJECTED when an overclaim is injected). Never a bare governance PASS.
phase: B4 — commercial (revenue lane, pulled parallel after B0)
title: "Brain Coherence Report" Tier-1 deliverable template + scoring rubric

subject.note: renders the sellable-NOW Tier-1 client deliverable from the brain-audit diagnostic set; grounded in brain-audit-v1 (7 categories) + brain-as-a-service Tier-1 anchor; judged by the repo language_gate (scan/decide, surface=public). Sources read-only.

what_it_proves: the report renders one scored section for each of the 7 real brain-audit categories (stack fragmentation, definition drift, agent theater, missing receipts, dead workflows, founder overload, missing decision-spine) + a 0-5 scoring rubric
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner
Tier-3 and Tier-4 autonomy tiers render LOCKED / proof-gated, never 'available'; the report makes no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim (Tier-1 diagnosis only)
POSITIVE — the REAL rendered report does NOT FAIL the language_gate (public surface) -> CHECK_OK (decision=WARN on undefined title-case terms only, no OVERCLAIM/BANNED_REGISTER)
NEGATIVE — a MINIMAL MUTATION of that same on-disk artifact (flip one field 'Diagnosis only' -> '100% guaranteed certified') makes the gate FAIL on OVERCLAIM -> CHECK_REJECTED
minimality: reversing the single injection reproduces the clean artifact byte-for-byte (no strawman, no schema relaxation); same gate, opposite verdicts
the dogfood uses scan/decide directly, writing NO receipt into the tracked language_gate/receipts dir
chess_patches_applied: positive fixture is the REAL rendered deliverable (built from the real 7 categories + real template), not an authored strawman
negative fixture is a single-field mutation of that real artifact; gate policy is never relaxed to pass
dogfood runs scan/decide in-process (surface=public) instead of the pipeline, so no write lands in the tracked receipts dir
verdict vocab CHECK_OK / CHECK_REJECTED, origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; never a bare governance PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (sources + language_gate read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/CO-1)
Lock 10 commercial (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, tiers 3/4 LOCKED, no autonomy/outcome claim)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; gate run in-process with no receipt write)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands

results.red_run_canary: FIRED (asserting CHECK_OK on the overclaim mutant raised AssertionError, exit 1)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status --porcelain tracked changes outside CO-1 == 0)

exit_gate_B4: CO-1 done — sellable-NOW Tier-1 Brain Coherence Report template renders, dogfoods clean through the language_gate, and rejects an injected overclaim by minimal mutation.
next_action: wire the same renderer to a real (non-synthetic) findings JSON per engagement; consider CO-2+ (Tier-2 foundation-build scoping doc) on the same commercial lane.
